name: Radarr
description: Radarr movie library — search & add movies (minimum-availability aware), file details, download queue with warnings, disk space, profiles, and command triggers. Works with Radarr v3–v5.

settings.label: Radarr URL
settings.help: Base URL of Radarr, e.g. http://192.168.0.10:7878 — no trailing slash.
